from typing import Union


def process_data(payload: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, str]:
    return {k: v.strip() for k, v in payload.items()}


def transform(value: Union[int, float]) -> dict[str, float]:
    return {"result": float(value)}


class DataModel:
    def __init__(self, data: dict[str, int]):
        self.data = data

    def get_value(self) -> dict[str, int]:
        return self.data


def parse_config(raw: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, str]:
    return dict(raw)
